newsSince: A10 Networks announced the acquisition of TrojAI, an AI-security firm, on June 15, 2026, positioning it for 'sovereign AI security' (protecting AI models, data and agents). The deal drove shares sharply higher and BWS Financial raised its price target to $45 from $30. FY2026 guidance (10-12% revenue growth) was reaffirmed.

sources.label: Simply Wall St: TrojAI acquisition investment case
A10 reaffirmed 2026 guidance and dividend (Yahoo Finance)
Why A10 stock is climbing today (Investing.com)

verdicts.rankRationale: Since June 9 the TrojAI acquisition (June 15) directly bolts 'sovereign AI security' onto the application-delivery thesis, the exact security_sovereign tag this page rewards; PT raised to $45. Genuine thesis strengthening, not just price; move up vs it_security peers.
verdicts.bull: TrojAI deal adds AI-model/agent security to existing app-delivery franchise; peak enterprise AI-security demand; PT to $45.
verdicts.neutral: Small $2.4B cap, deal still to integrate; reaffirmed 10-12% revenue growth is solid but not transformational yet.
verdicts.bear: +98% YTD prices in much of the optimism; tiny tuck-in acquisition, execution and AI-security competition risk.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Stretched valuation after the run; integration/competition
